order.title: Xaj VPS
order.tosAgree: Kuv tau nyeem cov cai saum toj no thiab kuv pom zoo.
order.rootPasswordNote: Nco ntsoov: Tus Lej Zais yuav tsum muaj tsawg kawg 8 tus cim, ib me, ib loj, ib lej, ib tus cim tshwj xeeb.
order.billingCycleDiscount: Kev Txo Nqi Voj Voog Them Nqi:
order.agreeToTerms: Pom Zoo Rau Cov Lus Cog Tseg
order.subscriptionRenewal: Kev sau npe yuav hloov tshiab tsis tu ncua tom qab {period} ntawm {cost} txog thaum tshem.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Los ntawm kev kuam lub thawv no, koj lees paub tias koj yuav cov khoom sau npe uas hloov tshiab tsis tu ncua. Xa email rau: billing{'@'}interserver.net los tshem. Koj lees paub tias tau nyeem thiab pom zoo rau peb Cov Lus Cog Tseg.

changeRootPassword.title: Hloov Tus Lej Nkag Root VPS
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Tus Lej Nkag thiab Paub Meej Tus Lej Nkag tsis sib xws

reinstallOs.title: Nruab Dua OS
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Nruab dua qhov tsav khoom siv yuav rho txhua cov ntaub ntawv.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Ua ntej nruab dua qhov tsav khoom siv, thov ua ib daim backup.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: Kuv xav teeb tsa dua OS!

buyIp.title: Kev Ntxiv IP Ntxiv Rau Koj VPS

changeTimezone.title: Hloov {module} Sijhawm Cheeb Tsam
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Koj yuav tsum tua koj {module} kom tag ua ntej hloov lub sijhawm cheeb tsam.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS yuav raug tua thiab pib dua thaum txheej txheem no.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Sijhawm cheeb tsam ntawm nplooj ntawv no yuav ib txwm rov qab rau America/New_York.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Hloov Webuzo Tus Lej Zais Admin
changeWebuzoPassword.portalLoginPassword: Peb Portal Login Tus Lej Zais
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Tus lej zais thiab lees paub tus lej zais tsis sib xws

resetPassword.title: Pib Dua VPS Tus Lej Zais
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Kev pib dua Windows tus lej zais yuav ua rau kev kaw tsis zoo. Xav txog qhov no raws li txoj kev kawg. Txheeb xyuas hauv VNC tias tsis muaj kev hloov tshiab tab tom khiav.
resetPassword.confirmReset: Kuv xav Pib Dua Tus Lej Zais!

reverseDns.title: Reverse DNS
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Kev hloov Reverse DNS siv sijhawm txog ib teev tshwm.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Muaj siv tau tsuas yog ntawm Windows Platform. Remote desktop yog txoj kev sai thiab yooj yim los txuas rau virtual machine lub rooj haujlwm.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Administrator tus lej zais yuav tsum teeb tsa ua ntej rau VPS ua ntej koj tuaj yeem siv remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Txuas nrog VNC los yog HTML5 VNC los teeb koj tus lej zais pib.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: Rau remote desktop kev qhia nyem
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC tso cai rau koj txuas rau virtual machine lub rooj haujlwm. Koj lub computer IP chaw nyob yuav tsum tau muab kev nkag mus ua ntej txuas tau.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Muab Koj IP nkag mus rau VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Thov tos 2 feeb kom ua tiav.
vnc.vncClientNote: Koj kuj tseem tuaj yeem rub tawm ib qho ntawm ntau VNC clients muaj nyob hauv internet. Peb pom zoo TightVNC.
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client uas ua haujlwm zoo hauv txhua browser niaj hnub no suav nrog cov browser ntawm xov tooj (iOS thiab Android).

setupVnc.title: Teeb Tsa VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: IP los muab VNC nkag mus
setupVnc.grantAccess: Muab VNC Nkag Mus Rau IP

backup.noBackup: Tsis muaj backup tam sim no

restore.offlineNote: Koj lub server yuav offline thaum hloov koj cov ntaub ntawv nrog cov ntaub ntawv backup. Tiv tauj kev pab rau tej lus nug.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Ntaus Login Tus Lej Zais los Txheeb Xyuas Kev Rov Qab.
restore.confirmRestore: Koj puas xav rov qab rau backup no tiag tiag?

trafficUsage.title: Bandwidth / Kev Siv Tsheb Thauj
trafficUsage.billingNote: Qhov no tsis siv rau kev xam them nqi thiab yog kwv yees xwb raws li koj cov virtual network cards.

slices.title: Txhim Kho / Txo Cov Txiav

slices.proratedNote: Tus nqi sib npaug them tam sim no.
slices.recurringBillNote: Nqi rov ua dua yuav hloov li ntau no
